page.content: In Table 1, the headers include Time point 1 (r, p), Time point 2 (r, p), and Change (tp2 − tp1) (r, p). The first row for FA shows values of .34 with p < .001 at Time point 1, .30 with p < .001 at Time point 2, and a change of − .05 with p = .516. The second row for MD displays − .27 with p < .001 at Time point 1, − .24 with p = .003 at Time point 2, and a change of .03 with p = .756. The third row for RD presents − .31 with p < .001 at Time point 1, − .27 with p < .001 at Time point 2, and a change of .03 with p = .736. The fourth row for AD indicates − .13 with p = .132 at Time point 1, − .13 with p = .104 at Time point 2, and a change of .02 with p = .814.

page.content: In Table 2, the headers are Statistics, DBH (cm), H (m), Age (years), BEF, R, and C (kg). The Average values are 24.69 for DBH, 16.69 for H, 21.67 for Age, 1.39 for BEF, 0.07 for R, and 113.01 for C. The Minimum values are 14.29 for DBH, 12.72 for H, 14.00 for Age, 1.05 for BEF, 0.03 for R, and 25.91 for C. The Maximum values are 33.39 for DBH, 19.90 for H, 31.00 for Age, 2.06 for BEF, 0.12 for R, and 228.43 for C. The Standard Deviation values are 5.62 for DBH, 2.07 for H, 5.85 for Age, 0.25 for BEF, 0.02 for R, and 58.20 for C. The Coefficient of Variation values are 22.76 for DBH, 12.39 for H, 27.00 for Age, 17.94 for BEF, 31.15 for R, and 51.50 for C. The sample size N is 30 for all measurements.
